title: Resource Management for Pods and Containers — Resource types
text:
A
resource type
has a base unit and can be requested, limited, or both.
Kubernetes has the following built-in resource types:
Resource type
Description
Base unit
cpu
Compute processing
cpu (core)
memory
RAM
Bytes
ephemeral-storage
Local ephemeral storage
Bytes
hugepages-<size>
Huge pages
(Linux only)
Bytes
Clusters can also provide
extended resources
(resources with a custom name, typically exposed by device plugins).
